videos.title: Unlock more productivity with 5 new productivity apps support | Available in Logi Marketplace
videos.description:
We’re excited to announce the further expansion of our Marketplace. We’re expanding the Logi Marketplace with support for 5 new productivity apps: Microsoft Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Slack, and Notion. For the first time, we’re moving beyond creativity tools to support the productivity apps you already use every day. These plugins are available with any MX mouse, keyboard, and the MX Creative Console.

In this video, discover:

- What’s new: Support for 5 productivity apps launching today.
- How

videos.title: How to use Enhanced Easy-Switch across your MX Mouse & Keyboard
videos.description:
If you work across multiple computers, switching your mouse and keyboard individually is not ideal. Learn how to synchronize your MX mouse and MX keyboard in three simple steps to reduce interruptions and stay in your flow.

Quick Setup Guide:
- Download Logi Options+ App: Ensure you have the latest version from app.logi.com.
- Synchronize Channels: Pair your MX mouse and keyboard to the same channel on each computer.
- Link Devices: Open Options+, navigate to the keyboard's Easy Switch tab, and

videos.title: Enhanced Easy-Switch FAQ's: Expert Tips with our Product Manager
videos.description:
Hear from Product and Innovation Manager Ludovico Novelli as he answers all your Easy-Switch questions in this deep-dive FAQ session.
The Enhanced Easy-Switch feature enables your MX mouse to automatically follow your MX Keys S or MX Keys Mini keyboard when switching between computers. MX Mechanical coming soon, stay tuned!

videos.title: MX mouse now follows MX keyboard! Enhanced Easy-Switch in Logi Options+
videos.description:
Tired of switching your mouse and keyboard separately to different computers?

In this video, we’re diving into the latest update for Logi Options+ App that changes the game for multi-device setups. With the enhanced Easy-Switch feature, your MX mouse and keyboard are finally in sync.

Now, when you switch your MX Keys S or MX Keys Mini to a different paired computer, your MX mouse follows it automatically. No more reaching for the bottom of your mouse or clicking extra buttons. It’s one seamles

videos.title: Logitech iPad Solutions for Education
videos.description: Logitech accessories enhance Apple®️ experiences—and that’s completely by design. In fact, we’ve been designing solutions for Apple products for over a decade. The result is a suite of tools that elevate every Apple experience with more functionality, more customization, and more comfort. Empower students to bring ideas to life with Logitech iPad Solutions.

videos.title: BTS - Logitech Muse for Apple Vision Pro
videos.description:
Go behind the scenes of our Logitech Muse for Apple Vision Pro production. 🎥✨
From concept to capture, we pushed creative and tech further using a Blackmagic camera to craft an immersive, first-of-its-kind marketing experience.
Innovation isn’t just in our products. It’s in how we tell their story.

videos.title: Logitech Mevo
videos.description: Discover why Logitech Mevo makes video simple and flexible. This short overview shows how Mevo helps you create professional-quality video with fewer cables, fewer cameras, and no production crew. Control shots from one app and scale easily for classrooms, meetings, and live events.
